payload.summary_zh: GEOFlow 2.1 切换到 PHP-FPM + Nginx 架构，dashboard 加 60s 缓存，URL 采集入库章节结构由 AI 补充调研 7 节 markdown 重组，修复联系方式误判与 entrypoint 并发锁死锁，并补上 Embedding 全局 SSL 校验策略。
payload.summary_en: GEOFlow 2.1 switches to PHP-FPM + Nginx, adds 60s dashboard cache, restructures URL import knowledge markdown around the AI web-research 7-section output, fixes contact-info misdetection and entrypoint concurrent-lock deadlock, and adds global SSL verify policy for Embedding calls.
payload.upgrade_tip_zh: 升级前请确认 .env 中 PHP_CLI_IMAGE=php:8.4-fpm-bookworm；升级后请重建 geoflow-app 镜像（首次切到 FPM 时需要）并清理所有 Laravel 缓存。
payload.upgrade_tip_en: Before upgrading, ensure .env has PHP_CLI_IMAGE=php:8.4-fpm-bookworm. After upgrading, rebuild the geoflow-app image (required when first switching to FPM) and clear all Laravel caches.
